// ── Seed COA via API ─────────────────────────────────────────
// Full 90-account Nigerian COA for Dolibarr

const { targetUrl, apiKey, entityId, dryRun } = $('Parse & Validate Input').all()[0].json;

const ACCOUNTS = [
  ['1000','Cash and Cash Equivalents','ASSET','CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1001','Petty Cash Naira','ASSET','CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1002','Current Account CBN Commercial Banks','ASSET','CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1003','Domiciliary Account','ASSET','CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1100','Accounts Receivable','ASSET','CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1101','VAT Recoverable Input VAT','ASSET','CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1102','WHT Credit Receivable','ASSET','CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1103','Staff Advances Prepayments','ASSET','CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1104','Prepaid Expenses','ASSET','CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1105','Accrued Income','ASSET','CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1200','Inventory Finished Goods','ASSET','CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1201','Inventory Raw Materials','ASSET','CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1202','Inventory Work-in-Progress','ASSET','CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1300','Property Plant Equipment','ASSET','NON_CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1301','Accumulated Depreciation PPE','ASSET','NON_CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1302','Intangible Assets','ASSET','NON_CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1303','Accumulated Amortisation','ASSET','NON_CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1304','Right-of-Use Assets IFRS 16','ASSET','NON_CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['1400','Deferred Tax Asset','ASSET','NON_CURRENT_ASSET'],
  ['2000','Accounts Payable','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2001','Accrued Expenses','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2100','VAT Payable Output 7.5%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2101','VAT Payable Zero-Rated','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2102','VAT Control Account','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2110','WHT Payable Dividends 10%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2111','WHT Payable Interest 10%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2112','WHT Payable Rent 10%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2113','WHT Payable Contracts Supplies 5%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2114','WHT Payable Professional Fees 10%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2115','WHT Payable Director Fees 10%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2116','WHT Payable Technical Fees 10%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2117','WHT Payable Commissions 10%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2118','WHT Payable Royalties 10%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2119','WHT Payable Construction 2.5%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2120','PAYE Tax Payable','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2121','Pension Payable Employer 10%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2122','Pension Payable Employee 8%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2123','NHF Payable 2.5%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2124','NSITF Levy Payable 1%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2125','ITF Levy Payable 1%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2126','NITDA Levy Payable 1%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2130','CIT Payable Current Year','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2131','Development Levy Payable 4%','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2132','Capital Gains Tax Payable','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2133','Stamp Duty Payable','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2140','Short-term Loans Borrowings','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2141','Customer Deposits Advances','LIABILITY','CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2200','Long-term Loans Borrowings','LIABILITY','NON_CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2201','Lease Liabilities IFRS 16','LIABILITY','NON_CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['2202','Deferred Tax Liability','LIABILITY','NON_CURRENT_LIABILITY'],
  ['3000','Share Capital Proprietors Capital','EQUITY','EQUITY'],
  ['3001','Share Premium','EQUITY','EQUITY'],
  ['3002','Retained Earnings','EQUITY','EQUITY'],
  ['3003','General Reserve','EQUITY','EQUITY'],
  ['3004','Statutory Reserve','EQUITY','EQUITY'],
  ['3005','Foreign Currency Translation Reserve','EQUITY','EQUITY'],
  ['4000','Sales Revenue Goods','INCOME','OPERATING_REVENUE'],
  ['4001','Sales Revenue Services','INCOME','OPERATING_REVENUE'],
  ['4002','Sales Revenue Digital SaaS','INCOME','OPERATING_REVENUE'],
  ['4003','Export Sales Revenue Zero-rated','INCOME','OPERATING_REVENUE'],
  ['4004','Commission Income','INCOME','OPERATING_REVENUE'],
  ['4005','Franchise Licence Income','INCOME','OPERATING_REVENUE'],
  ['4100','Interest Income','INCOME','OTHER_INCOME'],
  ['4101','Rental Income','INCOME','OTHER_INCOME'],
  ['4102','Dividend Income','INCOME','OTHER_INCOME'],
  ['4103','Foreign Exchange Gain','INCOME','OTHER_INCOME'],
  ['4104','Gain on Disposal of Assets','INCOME','OTHER_INCOME'],
  ['4105','Grant Subsidy Income','INCOME','OTHER_INCOME'],
  ['5000','Cost of Goods Sold','EXPENSE','COST_OF_SALES'],
  ['5001','Direct Labour Production Wages','EXPENSE','COST_OF_SALES'],
  ['5002','Direct Materials Consumables','EXPENSE','COST_OF_SALES'],
  ['5003','Import Duties Customs Levies','EXPENSE','COST_OF_SALES'],
  ['5004','Freight Delivery Inbound','EXPENSE','COST_OF_SALES'],
  ['6000','Staff Salaries Wages','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6001','PAYE Tax Expense','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6002','Employer Pension Contribution 10%','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6003','NSITF Premium 1%','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6004','ITF Levy 1%','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6005','Group Life Insurance','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6010','Rent and Lease','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6011','Electricity and Power','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6012','Internet and Telecoms','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6013','Repairs and Maintenance','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6014','Fuel and Transportation','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6020','Professional Fees','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6021','Consulting Outsourcing Fees','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6022','Advertising and Marketing','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6023','Bank Charges Commission','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6024','Travel Accommodation Domestic','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6025','Travel Accommodation International','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6026','Printing Stationery Office Supplies','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6027','Security Services','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6028','Cleaning Janitorial Services','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6029','Insurance Premiums','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6030','Depreciation PPE','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6031','Amortisation Intangibles','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['6032','Depreciation Right-of-Use Assets','EXPENSE','OPERATING_EXPENSE'],
  ['7000','Companies Income Tax Expense','EXPENSE','TAX_EXPENSE'],
  ['7001','Development Levy 4% Expense','EXPENSE','TAX_EXPENSE'],
  ['7002','Capital Gains Tax Expense','EXPENSE','TAX_EXPENSE'],
  ['7003','Deferred Tax Expense','EXPENSE','TAX_EXPENSE'],
  ['7004','Minimum Tax Expense','EXPENSE','TAX_EXPENSE'],
  ['8000','Interest Expense Borrowings','EXPENSE','FINANCE_COST'],
  ['8001','Finance Cost Lease IFRS 16','EXPENSE','FINANCE_COST'],
  ['8002','Foreign Exchange Loss','EXPENSE','FINANCE_COST'],
  ['8003','Loss on Disposal of Assets','EXPENSE','FINANCE_COST'],
];

const results = { created: 0, skipped: 0, errors: 0, log: [] };

if (!dryRun) {
  for (const [code, label, type, subtype] of ACCOUNTS) {
    try {
      const checkRes = await fetch(`${targetUrl}/api/index.php/accountingaccounts?sqlfilters=(t.account_number:=:'${code}')`, {
        headers: { 'DOLAPIKEY': apiKey }
      });
      const existing = await checkRes.json();
      if (Array.isArray(existing) && existing.length > 0) {
        results.skipped++;
        continue;
      }

      const postRes = await fetch(`${targetUrl}/api/index.php/accountingaccounts`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'DOLAPIKEY': apiKey, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          account_number: code, label,
          pcg_type: type, pcg_subtype: subtype,
          fk_pcg_version: 'NG-IFRS-SME',
          entity: entityId, active: 1
        })
      });
      const postData = await postRes.json();
      if (typeof postData === 'number' && postData > 0) {
        results.created++;
      } else {
        results.errors++;
        results.log.push(`ERROR ${code}: ${JSON.stringify(postData)}`);
      }
    } catch(e) {
      results.errors++;
      results.log.push(`EXCEPTION ${code}: ${e.message}`);
    }
  }
} else {
  results.log.push('DRY RUN — no accounts were created');
  results.skipped = ACCOUNTS.length;
}

return [{ json: { ...($('Parse & Validate Input').all()[0].json), coa_results: results } }];
